commands_run: npx playwright install chromium (web-react or e2e-comparison)
cd e2e-comparison && CI=1 npx playwright test
notes: PR #12 base branch per gh: main; head: cursor/angular-react-migration-f924.
Angular and React share the same git commit in this workspace; both apps were exercised from that tree.
json-server serves db.json; credentials used in tests: admin@mail.com / admin; customer john.doe@example.com / Password123!.
Playwright webServer in e2e-comparison/playwright.config.ts starts json-server (3000), ng serve (4200), and Vite (5173) when CI=1.
Ports 4200/5173/3000 were confirmed free before CI runs (pre-existing listeners would make webServer fail).
